messages:
We are a family of five coming from Saudi Arabia for a short vacation, from January 31 to February 10.
We are interested in renting your apartment. Please note that cleanliness is very important to us, and we expect the apartment to be clean and well-prepared, with a fresh and pleasant smell upon arrival.
We are a quiet and respectful family and will take good care of the property during our stay.

Thank you, and we look forward to your confirmation.
نحن ٥ اشخاص بس نسيت اكتب في الحجز
اندفع المبلغ ولا لا؟ مو واضح عندي
ما جاتني رسالة سحب
تمام ممتاز شكراً لك

وصلتني الرسالة من البنك 👍🏻
الدخول الساعة ٣ باذن الله صحيح؟
Ok I’ll send you the passports
Shall I send you the passports here or on WhatsApp?
بالنسبة للتنضيف ٢٠ دولار لكامل فترة الاقامة؟ او ٢٠ دولار لكل مرة ؟
Ok wait let me see if someone is in that room

Can you postponed it tell tomorrow morning please. 
Now is not a suitable time
Let me know what time in the morning tomorrow and I will let them in
hi Omar, I have been in new Cairo too with my wife
All of our. Paspor
My WhatsApp number +6285782692096
Ok had sent my pasport via your whatsApp
Notes, thanks for your reminder. Now iam preparing, and heckout berofe 11.00am or about 10.50/10.55am insyaAllah

Hi, I am interested in booking. I have been before to this compound and I know there is construction. What building number is this? and is there any construction in the building or in the building next to it?
I also want to confirm that no pets are allowed?
Also is this flat on the ground floor with balcony opening to garden and pool?
Do you have available a 1 ot 2 bed apartment available with direct access to garden/pool? Form 3rd till 8th Nov?

Hi again,

I am looking for something on the ground floor so that my toddler daughter can go straight out to the garden.

So this is the only apartment you have avaialble on the ground floor. You have none with direct access to pool, even if theh are bigger?

Also please advise what building number is this 2 bedroom ground floor?

I have been to Silver Palm before and I usually stay with Silver Springs but I have found out they accept pets and so will not continue with them any longer. This is why I want to know building number.

Please advise.
Hi Omar
Do you have anything on ground floor from the 4th onwards with direct access?
Are they in the same building?
Can you send me listing for the 2nd floor flat you mentioned
Ive given you a headache I know but my wife is pregnant and I want to make sure things run smoothly. The garden is for my daughter and o1 has soft play so its good.
Can you send me link for 2nd floor so I can have a look
Also what building number is it.
Okay perfect I will get back to you with which 1 we choose. Are they both on the same floor?
I will probably book whichever of the 2 for the whole 5 nights and while we are there if ground floor becomes available and we want to move, we will discuss with you further.
I will probably go for 3 bedroom. Is it on the 3rd floor?
Also Building 8 does it have any noise or construction?
No pets?
Inshallah will book in next hour because you have answered all my questions 😀
Baby cot and high char available,m
Perfect. And I just ready no essentials. Does that mean no towels, tissue paper and soap?
Haha okah. As long as towels and sanitary items available then we are good to go!!!
Ill book now

Hey Omar! Sorry to keep bothering you but my wife said she’d prefer this one if available. Would you be able to provide a discount on this? We will likely extend to a month but for now can only book the one week.
Hello, can someone share the WiFi name with me? It was only the password
Thank you!
There are none that start with BR
Where is the WiFi router?
Hello please can someone reply as it is quite important, there is no WiFi starting with BR and I can’t find the router
No worries at all and thanks so much
Hi Omar, just informing you there has been leaking in the living room from the floods
Also if we want to book a clean what are the prices
Can someone come to deal with the leak please? It hasn’t stopped
It’s also leaking in the kitchen
Hi Omar, we have been in a power cut all moring
It seems other apartments are fine
Hello?
We have Ben without electricity all day until now
This is unacceptable
Can someone fix this asap we have no WiFi not able to charge phones nothing
It is still not on and it’s 5pm
Yes thank you
Hi Omar the AC hasnt been releasing cold air and we aren’t able to sleep
It make a sound but no cold air comes out
We tried everything it didn’t work
It was working fine two days ago
Can someone go to fix it today asap please?
Also I would like to book cleaning and line change too
Ok thank you
We are not in the apartment right now but feel free to tell them to go in
Hello has someone fixed the AC
